'''Nishr''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], home to a [[near-Human]] [[Species/Legends|species]] known as the [[Nish]]. It was the scene of a [[Nishr Campaign|conflict]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Description==
The most important landmass on Nishr was the continent of [[Feldt]]. The terrain was predominantly open and low-lying, but climate and landscape varied: there were temperate areas and desert, forests and rough ground, and at least one area of significant upland, accessible only through passes. There must also have been seas surrounding Feldt.

During the era of the Galactic Empire, the native Nish were still primarily in a feudal stage of development, but in the southern regions of Feldt, below the mountains, an industrial society was developing, and several cities had grown up on this continent.

From an interstellar perspective, Nishr had two main points of interest. Its location in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] gave it some local strategic value, and it had untapped [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] resources.

==History==
In Fourth Month of [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], a small Imperial [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] was deployed to Nishr, and accompanied by [[Imperial Mining Corporation]] surveyors. [[Major General]] [[Vin Kollis]] of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] was appointed as garrison commander and [[Planetary Governor/Legends|Planetary Governor]].

[[Governor-General/Legends|Governor-General]] Kollis was not a hard-liner, but abuses by his troops provoked the natives into rebellion, leading to the bloody [[Nishr Suppression]]. Around Sixth Month of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], reinforcements were dispatched to secure control, raising the garrison to [[Regiment/Legends|regiment]] strength, and these events caught the attention of the Rebel Alliance, which dispatched a fast-moving armored force designated the [[Nishr Taskforce]], under [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Fisk Csino]]. Their mission was described formally as giving support to the local insurrection, but its real agenda was to tie down unnecessary numbers of Imperial troops on Nish, drawing them away from locations elsewhere in the [[Sector/Legends|Sector]].

Thus began the [[Nishr Campaign]].

The Alliance task force was much smaller than the Imperial garrison, essentially just a reinforced [[Company/Legends|company]] of light tanks and scout cars, and it was only able to secure limited local support. The majority of the Nish remained subdued after the Suppression. But the Alliance enjoyed one major advantage. The Imperial [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] wing assigned to the planet had been wiped out by Rebel [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] covering the deployment of the taskforce, depriving the garrison of air cover to combat the agile Rebel [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]].

Eventually, the Imperial garrison's main mobile force was lured into a trap, and largely eliminated. This left Kollis with just infantry and lumbering walker armor, neither of which was able to maintain territorial control. The Imperials retreated back into the uplands, securing the passes with troops, and falling back on the heavy weapons of their base.

Stalemate ensued: the Rebels could not challenge the Imperial base immediately, and the Imperials could not secure the reinforcements that they needed to retake lost ground.

It is not known at present what the outcome of the campaign was.
